_description: Microscope parameters for BCR fixed B cell FLFM dataset (Sims et al. 2020, Optica)
_csv_format_doc: Format of 2D localisation CSV file. PEAKFIT = ImageJ GDSC SMLM2 PeakFit output.
_mla_type_doc: MLA lattice arrangement: HEXAGONAL or SQUARE.
_mla_lens_pitch_doc: Pitch between adjacent microlens centers, parallel to optical table (microns).
_mla_optic_size_doc: Physical diameter of the MLA optic (microns). Determines how many lenses are in the array.
_mla_centre_doc: X,Y centre of the MLA in lattice-spacing units (fractional lens spacings).
_mla_rotation_doc: Rotation of MLA relative to camera axes (degrees). Must be tuned to match data.
_mla_offset_doc: X,Y offset of MLA relative to camera centre (microns). Usually [0,0] after centering.
_focal_length_mla_doc: Focal length of the microlens array (mm).
_focal_length_obj_lens_doc: Focal length of the objective lens (mm). For a 60x objective with 200mm tube: f_obj = 200/60.
_focal_length_fourier_lens_doc: Focal length of the Fourier relay lens (mm). Places BFP at MLA plane.
_focal_length_tube_lens_doc: Focal length of the tube lens (mm).
_z_calib_doc: Calibration factor converting optical (parallax) Z to physical Z distance (microns/micron). Determined experimentally by imaging beads at known axial positions.
_filter_lenses_doc: Remove localizations assigned to microlenses outside the BFP radius.
_filter_rhos_doc: Keep only localizations with normalised pupil radius rho in [min, max]. null = no filter.
_filter_spot_sizes_doc: Keep only localizations with spot sigma in [min, max] microns. null = no filter.
_filter_photons_doc: Keep only localizations with photon count in [min, max]. null = no filter.
_alpha_model_doc: Model for angular sensitivity alpha(u,v). LINEAR: alpha=uv; SPHERE: spherical wavefront; INTEGRATE_SPHERE: phase-averaged over microlens aperture (most accurate).
_fit_params_aberration_doc: Fitting parameters for aberration-correction pass (first 1000 frames).
_aberration_params_doc: Criteria for which fitted molecules contribute to the aberration map.
_fit_params_full_doc: Fitting parameters for the final full-dataset pass.
_show_max_lateral_err_doc: Filter threshold for visualization: maximum lateral fit error (nm).
_show_min_view_count_doc: Filter threshold for visualization: minimum number of views.
